# Rule: bearer_token
# Category: technology
# Jurisdiction: global
#
# Preserves the `Bearer ` scheme and the first 6 runes of the token,
# appending `****...` as the elision marker (four mask runes then three
# literal dots). Example: Bearer abc123def456 → Bearer abc123****...
